MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CARRIER CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: WILLIAM F. RUIZ, ESQUIRE (BRAYTON PURCELL, 415.898.1555) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. FERLIN P. RUIZ, ESQUIRE (TUCKER ELLIS & WEST, 415.617.2222) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. BOTH ARE BASED ON THE SAME FACTS AND DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS WHILE WORKING ON DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS. IN HIS DEPOSITION, PLAINTIFF DESCRIBES THE WORK AT PAGES 618 AND 1047. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THIS WORK DID NOT EXPOSE PLAINTIFF TO ASBESTOS FROM DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS. IT MAY WELL BE THAT CHANGING A THERMOCOUPLE AND/OR BREAKING CONNECTIONS DO NOT RELEASE ASBESTOS, BUT THE RECORD IS SILENT ON THIS POINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
